description: Left side holds a screenshot or image; right side carries title and text content. The visual leads and the text explains.
usage: Use this layout for DALP/browser screenshots. It is the approved browser-frame slot for screenshots; diagrams or stock art can be used only when the slide still makes sense visually.
potential_usage: Works for UI-first presentations, visual-led product stories, or any slide where the image is the hook.

placeholder_summary.TITLE_0: Main slide title — states the key message or topic
placeholder_summary.BODY_11: Subtitle, date, presenter name, or event description
placeholder_summary.SLIDE_NUMBER_10: Auto-generated slide number footer (do not edit)
placeholder_summary.PICTURE_12: Browser-frame placeholder — DALP screenshots belong here; diagrams and stock art are allowed when needed

content_suggestions.TITLE_0: Slide title (3–8 words describing Image Left + Text Right)
content_suggestions.BODY_11: Subtitle text, date, or event name (1–2 lines)
content_suggestions.PICTURE_12: Insert DALP screenshot, browser mockup, or diagram framed for browser view
